title: calamagrostis × filipes
intro: Calamagrostis × xanthoides subsp. arundinacea 'Karl Foerster' is also known as Calamagrostis × filipes, but I couldn't find any information about the exact plant name "Calamagrostis × filipes". However, I found information on Calamagrostis arundinacea 'Karl Foerster', which is a type of ornamental grass known for its feathery plumes and is often used in landscaping. Unfortunately, I was unable to find any reliable sources on the medicinal or health benefits of Calamagrostis arundinacea 'Karl Foerster', but it has been used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
